commands.repair_reason: This PR needs contributor real behavior proof plus maintainer product/security judgment about a persistence opt-in before automation should attempt code repair.; Needs attention: The diff changes default upstream data-retention behavior for all proxy-like Responses endpoints without an explicit operator opt-in.; Review finding: [P1] Make proxy response persistence opt-in — src/agents/openai-responses-payload-policy.... commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the Responses payload policy so `storeMode:"disable"` omits `store:false` for configured non-native Responses endpoints and adds a unit test for proxy versus native OpenAI behavior.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction is available from this PR. Source inspection and the linked issue logs show the current OpenClaw side can send or preserve `store:false` for proxy-like Responses routes, but the PR does not include a real LiteLLM multi-turn run.
commands.review_followup: This PR needs contributor real behavior proof plus maintainer product/security judgment about a persistence opt-in before automation should attempt code repair.
